Trap (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $42,777,281Details
International Box Office $40,900,000
Worldwide Box Office $83,677,281
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $428,008
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $650,103
Total $1,078,111
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A father and teen daughter attend a pop concert, where they realize they’re at the center of a dark and sinister event.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$15,454,146 (36.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.77 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:51.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,181 opening theaters/3,181 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $45,235,746

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 2nd, 2024 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: July 31st, 2024 (Wide) (Belgium)
August 1st, 2024 (Wide) (Australia)
August 1st, 2024 (Wide), released as Armadilha (Portugal)
August 1st, 2024 (Wide) (Thailand)
August 1st, 2024 (Wide), released as Trap: No Way Out (Austria)
Video Release: August 30th, 2024 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some violent content and brief strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2842 (cert #54966), 7/10/2024)
Running Time: 105 minutes
Filming location (country): Canada
Plot point: Police Detective, Serial Killer
Release detail: Disrupted by 2023 WGA & SAG Strikes
Subgenre: Psychological Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Blinding Edge Pictures, Warner Bros.
Production Countries: United States, United Kingdom, Yemen
Languages: English
